1.text: Pleural effusion extending to the apex of the lung in the supine position

2.text: Effusion measuring 50 mm at its thickest point

3.text: Atelectasis adjacent to the effusion in both lower lobes

4.text: Lower lobes of both lungs almost completely atelectatic except for the superior segments

5.text: Nodule measuring 17 mm in diameter in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

6.text: Multiple subcentimeter nodules in both lungs

7.text: Minimal emphysematous changes in both lungs

8.text: Minimal ground-glass opacity in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

9.text: Minimal interlobular septal thickening in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe
